笑死，拎一兩個hardcore fan黎講

上網睇咗鬼佬點睇韓劇

I had friends who used to gush about the latest Korean dramas so I decided to give it a try.

I wanted to pull my own hair out and chuck my laptop out the window after just 2 episodes. They are so terrible but for some reason, I couldn't stop watching. Each episode always ends on a cliffhanger.

First, I watched Playful Kiss followed by the Taiwanese and Thai versions. Then, I went back to Korean and watched a couple more romantic ones.

They all have the same terrible tropes.

The main guy is always so cruel, cold, smart, tall and from a rich family.

The girl is lower middle class, not so good at school but has a kind heart, usually has a dead parent.

It starts off as a comedy but explores a very dark past, usually involves a lot of crying and a lot of pep talks.

There will be a jealousy plot where one of the leads is seen with the opposite gender and the other spends the episode spying on them.

There will be a misunderstanding plot where a one of then eavesdrops on half a conversation and jumps to conclusion. This could easily be solved if they'd just talk it out but that's never an option.

Genuine question: Do the ones who enjoy this watch it despite its flaws or do they actually think its brilliant.
